title: EPS-95 pension hike: Will Centre raise minimum pension from ₹1,000 to ₹7,500?
summary: EPS-95 pensioners’ demand for a hike in the minimum pension from ₹1,000 to ₹7,500 per month remains unresolved. The Minister of State for Labour and Employment acknowledged that, though several stakeholders have sought a pension hike, no decision has been made on the matter yet.&nbsp;

title: New labour code: Salary must be paid by 7th of next month. What employees should know
summary: The Code on Wages, 2019 prescribes when employers must pay salaries and settle final dues after an employee leaves a job. Here's what the law says about salary payment timelines, delayed wages and employee rights.

title: LTCG and STCG: Key tax rules for equity shares and mutual fund investors in FY 2025-26
summary: The government has ruled out changes to equity LTCG tax for now. Investors should understand STCG and LTCG rules, holding periods, tax rates, SIP taxation and redemption strategies to manage equity investments better.

title: Old Pension Scheme: Centre allows select government employees to opt for OPS. Who is eligible?
summary: The Centre has clarified that eligible compassionate ground appointees who applied before January 1, 2004, but joined service later, can opt for the Old Pension Scheme. The benefit is limited to a specific category of employees and does not extend to all NPS subscribers.

title: Fast approval, less paperwork: How AI is changing the loan game
summary: Account Aggregators are giving lenders a richer picture of borrowers—and potentially faster, cheaper loans. But the data trail can become harder to see once it reaches the lender.

title: FPIs not exempt: Centre clarifies 12.5% LTCG tax on equity is same as for domestic investors
summary: Both FPIs and domestic investors continue to pay 12.5% LTCG tax on Indian equities. The exemption announced through the Income-tax Ordinance, 2026, applies only to FPIs investing in Government Securities (G-Secs).

title: Live near a toll plaza? NHAI RajmargYatra app now offers Digital Local Pass and MargMitra Help Centre
summary: NHAI has introduced Digital Local Pass and the MargMitra Help Centre on the RajmargYatra app. Commuters can now buy Local Passes online without visiting toll plazas, while MargMitra offers FASTag support, complaint tracking and other highway services in 22 Indian languages.

title: Gold, silver prices today, 21 July: Check retail rates of 24K, 22K gold, 999 silver in Delhi, Mumbai and Kolkata
summary: Gold and silver prices today, 21 July: Check the latest 24K, 22K gold and 999 silver retail rates across Delhi, Mumbai, Kolkata and other major Indian cities, along with MCX market updates.

title: Reported VRS payment as salary in ITR? Pune ITAT grants tax relief in ₹65.21 lakh case
summary: Pune ITAT has ruled that a ₹65.21 lakh payment received under a voluntary retirement scheme was a non-taxable capital receipt and not taxable salary or income from other sources. The tribunal also held that an incorrect claim in the ITR cannot override the true legal nature of the receipt.

title: Received an income tax notice? Verify authenticity before responding to protect against scams
summary: Taxpayers should always verify an Income Tax notice before responding. Using the PAN or Document Identification Number (DIN) on the official e-filing portal helps identify genuine notices, avoid scams, protect personal information and ensure timely compliance.

title: Global Market: Indonesia appoints banks for inaugural yuan-denominated panda bond issue
summary: Indonesia plans its first yuan-denominated panda bond issuance in China. A consortium of banks will arrange this debut offering in China's market. title: Global Market: Japan's Takaichi unveils growth blueprint, reiterates investment push amid bond market concerns

title: Global Market: Ant International raises $1.2 billion to fuel global expansion
summary: Ant International has raised $1.2 billion in a fresh funding round backed by Ant Group and Alibaba to accelerate its global expansion across merchant payments, financial services and enterprise solutions.

title: Oil prices to hit $120 soon? Goldman Sachs makes big prediction as Hormuz concerns loom
summary: Goldman Sachs has warned Brent crude could spike to $120 per barrel if disruptions through the Strait of Hormuz persist, though its base case assumes easing Middle East tensions and prices averaging $80 in Q4.

title: Rupee firms as oil retreats, traders gauge flow momentum under RBI measures
summary: The Indian rupee strengthened on Tuesday, benefiting from falling oil prices. Optimism over potential mediation in the U.S.-Iran conflict also aided sentiment. title: MSCI India rejig: Eternal likely to see highest inflows at $648 mn; Lenskart, Groww among Nuvama’s expected inclusions
summary: MSCI’s August India Standard Index review could trigger major passive inflows, with Eternal expected to attract the highest at $648 million, according to Nuvama. The brokerage sees Laurus Labs, Adani Energy Solutions, Lenskart and Groww among likely inclusions, while Balkrishna Industries, SBI Cards

title: Coal India subsidiary CMPDI shares climb 7% after Q1FY27 profit surges 54% YoY
summary: CMPDI shares jumped nearly 7% after the Coal India subsidiary reported strong Q1FY27 results, with revenue rising 18% and net profit surging 54% year-on-year. Robust operational growth and the announcement of a Rs 1.05-per-share interim dividend further lifted investor sentiment.

title: Oracle stock in free fall: What's driving the latest selloff and what's next?
summary: Oracle shares hit a 52-week low after an S&P credit downgrade raised concerns over heavy AI spending, rising debt and execution risks despite strong demand for its cloud services.
